queries.description: Explicit initialization of all non-static data members reduces the risk of an invalid state existing after successful construction.
queries.name: All direct, non-static data members of a class should be initialized before the class object is accessible

implementation_scope.description: Some false positives may occur due to extraction errors involving initializer declarations on members.

RULE-15-1-4.title: All direct, non-static data members of a class should be initialized before the class object is accessible
